itinerary.title: TRAGUIN Premium Chitrakote Adventure Package — Luxury Adventure • The Niagara of India • Jagdalpur Expedition
itinerary.tagline: Chitrakote Adventure • Jagdalpur • Chitrakote Falls • 04 Nights / 05 Days
itinerary.overview:
Discover the raw, untamed majesty of Chhattisgarh with TRAGUIN. Our Best Chitrakote Adventure Package invites you to explore the stunning Chitrakote Falls, where the mighty Indravati River thunders down in a breathtaking landscape. This curated Luxury Chhattisgarh Holiday combines thrilling adventure with premium stays, ensuring your family enjoys the scenic beauty and iconic attractions of Jagdalpur in absolute comfort.

TOUR OVERVIEW
This 4N/5D adventure is a perfectly balanced Chhattisgarh Family Tour, designed for thrill-seekers and luxury travelers. From exploring ancient Kutumsar Caves to witnessing the 'Niagara of India,' TRAGUIN ensures a seamless private journey. Your itinerary includes luxury 4x4 transfers, handpicked hotels, and exclusive nature excursions with TRAGUIN curated experiences throughout.

WHY CHOOSE THE CHITRAKOTE ADVENTURE PACKAGE?
For discerning travelers seeking raw natural beauty alongside premium comfort, this Luxury Chhattisgarh Holiday presents spectacular waterfall landscapes, subterranean cave wonders, and vibrant tribal artisan culture. Popular experiences include private boat rides at Chitrakote, Kutumsar Cave exploration, and Dokra metal art workshops — all delivered with TRAGUIN's signature personalized luxury support.
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days Chitrakote adventure (CG-002 / TG-CG-CHITRA-002): Chitrakote Falls, Kutumsar Caves, Tirathgarh, Dokra art, and 4-tier Jagdalpur hotels.

highlights.text: Jagdalpur arrival and Bastar orientation briefing on Day 01
Chitrakote Falls horseshoe waterfall and private boat ride on Day 02
Kutumsar Caves and Tirathgarh Falls adventure on Day 03
Bastar culture, Dokra artisan session, and local markets on Day 04

days.title: JAGDALPUR — ARRIVAL IN THE HEART OF BASTAR
days.description: Arrive in Jagdalpur, the cultural capital of Bastar. Receive a warm welcome from your TRAGUIN guide with refreshing adventure kits and mineral water. Transfer to your luxury resort nestled amid sal forest canopies. Relax before an evening briefing about the breathtaking landscapes of Bastar, including waterfall volumes, cave access protocols, and artisan village schedules curated by your dedicated tour manager.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Jagdalpur town orientation, Bastar Palace grounds preview.
Evening Experience: Pre-expedition briefing and specialty regional dinner.
Meals Included: Welcome Refreshments & Gourmet Dinner.

days.title: CHITRAKOTE — THE NIAGARA OF INDIA
days.description: Visit the spectacular Chitrakote Falls. Witness the scenic beauty of the Indravati River as it cascades in a horseshoe shape spanning nearly 300 meters — proudly called the 'Niagara of India'. Enjoy an immersive experience with a TRAGUIN Signature private boat ride at the base of these iconic attractions. Capture golden-hour photography from cliff-edge viewpoints before returning to your Jagdalpur luxury resort for an evening campfire dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Chitrakote Horseshoe Falls, Indravati River viewpoints.
TRAGUIN Signature: Private boat ride at the base of Chitrakote Falls.
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Riverside Dinner.

days.title: KUTUMSAR CAVES — ADVENTURE & DISCOVERY
days.description: Embark on an adventure to the Kutumsar Caves, famous for their unique blind fish and spectacular limestone formations carved over millions of years. Descend with certified cave escorts and headlamps through narrow archways into massive underground chambers. Later, visit Tirathgarh Falls for a breathtaking multi-tiered waterfall picnic set up by your resort team amid lush Kanger Valley greenery.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Kutumsar Caves, Tirathgarh Waterfalls, Kanger Valley corridor.
Evening Experience: Forest picnic lunch and relaxed resort evening.
Meals Included: Breakfast, Curated Picnic Lunch & Gourmet Dinner.

days.title: BASTAR CULTURE & LOCAL ART
days.description: Explore the local markets of Bastar, famous for Dokra metal art and terracotta crafts. Enjoy an exclusive session with local tribal artisans — a TRAGUIN curated experience where master craftsmen demonstrate the ancient lost-wax bell-metal casting technique unchanged since the Indus Valley Civilization. Visit the Anthropological Museum and browse vibrant weekly haats before a farewell celebration dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Dokra artisan village, Bastar Anthropological Museum, tribal haat.
TRAGUIN Signature: Exclusive artisan interaction and hands-on craft demonstration.
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Farewell Special Dinner.

days.title: DEPARTURE | MEMORIES OF A PREMIUM CHHATTISGARH EXPERIENCE
days.description: Savor a final hearty breakfast at your luxury resort. Your private chauffeur-driven vehicle will transfer you to Jagdalpur Airport or onward connection point for your departure, carrying unforgettable memories of waterfalls, caves, and tribal artistry curated by TRAGUIN.
activities: Transfers Included: Private luxury departure transfer.

Daily meals & luxury transportation for all sightseeing.
Sightseeing with TRAGUIN support and expert local guides.
Complimentary Experience: Private boat ride at Chitrakote Falls base.
